content: Prompt budgeting for limited-context local LLMs: define explicit token budget zones per prompt component (system, evidence, KB, hint) and reserve output headroom up-front; use llama.cpp /tokenize endpoint for exact counts when available, fallback heuristic chars/4 (chars/2 for JSON); on overflow degrade hierarchically per-component — breadth-first (more items, shorter excerpts) rather than dropping whole sections. Matches Sift's PromptBudget spec exactly.
